summary: Implemented the Browse All Cards page. Created BrowseAllCards component that renders all cards from the dataset in a responsive CSS Grid (1-col mobile, 2-col tablet, 3-col desktop) with empty state handling. Added pathname-based routing in App.tsx to serve /browse. Removed CardVisual max-width constraint to allow cards to fill grid cells. Fixed pre-existing lint error in test file. All 140 unit tests and 28 E2E tests pass.
